extortion.description: The Promise Nigeria Ltd is a leading brand in Nigeria’s fast-food and catering industry, renowned for its dedication to quality, freshness, and customer satisfaction. Established in 2000 and incorporated in 2003, the company has steadily expanded its presence, earning a strong reputation as one of the most trusted names in quick service dining and integrated catering solutions. From freshly prepared meals to large-scale corporate catering, The Promise has become a household name across Port Harcourt and beyond.
